  background-color: #ECF2FD !important;
  border: 1px solid #ECF2FD !important; 
  
  border-radius: 4px; 
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: all 0.2s ease; 
}

.nav-tabs .nav-link {
  color: #4B2C3E !important;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.nav-tabs .nav-link.active {
  color: #ECF2FD !important;
  background-color: #4B2C3E !important;
  border-color: #4B2C3E !important;
}

/* 4. Fikser fonten på kulepunktene så de ikke blir små/stygge */
.tab-content ul {
  font-size: 1.1rem !important; /* Juster tallet her hvis du vil ha den større/mindre */
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-top: 15px;
}

.tab-content li {
  margin-bottom: 10px; /* Gir litt luft mellom hvert bidrag */
  color: #333;
}

.nav-tabs .nav-link a {
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: inherit !important;
}
</style>

We are second- and third-year Bachelor's students in Political Science at the University of Stavanger. This project was carried out as a voluntary project under the supervision of Associate Professor [Carlo Knotz](https://www.uis.no/nb/profile/carlo-michael-knotz-0).



::: {.panel-tabset}

### Aud 
**Aud Statle Nævdal** 

3rd year Bachelor student (at the time of the project).

Key contributions:

-  Contributed the idea of investigating opinion formation.

-  Contributed to the development and refinement of survey questions.

-  Participated in the data collection process.

-  Contributed to the authoring of the analysis and results section.

### Awaatef
**[Awaatef Hassan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/awaatef-abdullah-hassan-6b1386345)**

2nd year Bachelor student (at the time of the project).

Key contributions:

-  Contributed to the development and refinement of survey questions.

-  Participated in the data collection process.

-  Contributed to the authoring of the theoretical framework. 

### Marie
**[Marie Langeland](https://www.linkedin.com/in/marie-langeland)** 

3rd year Bachelor student (at the time of the project).

Key contributions:

-  Developed the responsive landing page and implemented the randomization function for assigning respondents to the two survey versions.

-  Participated in the data collection process.

-  Created, managed, and contributed to the development and refinement of the surveys and survey questions.

-  Managed data cleaning, including filtering and recoding variables for analysis.

-  Performed statistical analysis and created data visualizations in R.

-  Built and managed the Quarto website for the project.

-  Authored the home page.

-  Authored the methodology and experimental design section.

-  Contributed to the authoring of the analysis and results section.

### Norman
**[Norman Sunde](https://www.linkedin.com/in/norman-sunde)** 

2nd year Bachelor student (at the time of the project).

Key contributions:

-  Contributed to the development and refinement of survey questions.

-  Participated in the data collection process.

-  Authored the documentation of the data collection process.

### William
**[William Thengs Egeli](https://www.linkedin.com/in/william-thengs-egeli-4204b8356)** 

3rd year Bachelor student (at the time of the project).

Key contributions:

-  Contributed to the development and refinement of survey questions.

-  Participated in the data collection process.

-  Contributed to the authoring of the theoretical framework. 

### Zainab
**[Zainab Ali](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zainab-ali-5b0a7a346/)** 

2nd year Bachelor student (at the time of the project).

Key contributions:

-  Contributed to the development and refinement of survey questions.

-  Participated in the data collection process.

-  Contributed to the authoring of the theoretical framework. 

:::
